title: Minecraft Asset Spec
description: Intermediate structured spec the AI fills in. A deterministic generator turns this into a .bbmodel. The AI must NEVER hand-write .bbmodel JSON; it only fills this spec.

name.description: ASCII model name. No CJK to avoid encoding issues.

target.description: Coordinate system. block: 0-16 box. entity: Minecraft entity model space. item: 16x16 item space. Locks the proportion/range checks.

archetype.description: Optional preset key (e.g. quadruped, humanoid, furniture_block, item_simple) that loads proportion anchors for the geometry-sanity validator.

atlas.description: Texture atlas. Size is flexible: explicit ints, or 'auto' to let the generator pack regions.

regions.description: Named rectangles in the atlas, used for fills/palettes. Coords in texture pixels.

rect.description: [x, y, w, h] in texture pixels.

parts.description: Cuboid parts. Explicit pixel sizes only; never let sizes be 'estimated' downstream.

id.description: ASCII unique id, e.g. head, ear_L, leg_FR.

parent.description: Parent part id for hierarchy/outliner. null/omitted = root.

pos.description: The MIN corner (from) in pixels. to = pos + size.

pivot.description: Rotation pivot (origin). Defaults to pos if omitted.

uv_mode.description: box: single box-UV from uv_origin. per_face: explicit faces map.

uv_origin.description: [u, v] top-left for box uv mode.

faces.description: Per-face UV when uv_mode=per_face. Keys: north,south,east,west,up,down.

region.description: Optional atlas region id to auto-derive uv.

z_offset_tag.description: If true, generator may apply a tiny anti-z-fighting offset.

face_details.description: Codex-style binding checklist, now as data. Each entry is validated against a real part+face or marked geometry.

kind.description: texture: painted onto a face UV. geometry: must be a real thin cuboid part.

uv.description: Texture-pixel rect [x,y,w,h] for the painted detail. Required when kind=texture.

color.description: Hex color for the painted detail.
